Also not counting hard mode clears, keeper level, star ratings, achievements etc

weekly rant 400 silver 10 basic x 4 = 1200 silver + 40 free pulls
daily  60 silver 1 basic x 30 = 1800 + 30 free pulls
10 premium pulls + 10 basic pulls from sediment exchange
Hard mode clear's for the event give 15 pulls each (10 core, + 1K silver)
+ 20 silver every couple hours if yo count expeditions
